verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faro' kiangah pai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' lakah hih keima limte ka lah theihna ding leh keimah in Egypt mite ka mawlpihna leh amaute' lakah bang limte bawl khin cihna thu na tate leh na tute' zakna-ah na gen theihna ding leh, Topa ka hihna na theihna dingin ama lungsim leh a nasemte' lungsim ka khauhsak hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Faro' kiangah Moses leh Aaron pai-in ama kiangah, “Hebru mite' Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Ka mai-ah nang na kiniamkhiatna ding bang tanvei nial ding na hi hiam? Amaute in keimah hong biak theihna dingin ka mite paisak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite paisak ding na nial leh, zing ciangin na gam sungah kauphete kong paipih ding a

kuamah in leitang a muh theihlohna dingin tuate in lei maitang khempeuh tuam ding uh hi. Gialpi khit cianga nang-a' dinga a omlai sunte amaute in ne ding uh hi. Tuate in gamlaka a po nangma singkung khempeuh ne ding uh a

nangma innte leh na nasemte khempeuh leh Egypt mite' inn khempeuhah dim ding uh hi. Na pu na pate uh leitang tungah a pian' uha kipan tuni donga tua bang a muh ngeilohte uh hi ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin amah kihei-in Faro' kiang panin a paikhia hi

Faro' nasemte in ama kiangah, “Eite tungah hih mipa bang tanvei thangzak hong hi niloh ding ahi hiam? Amaute in amau' Pasian, Topa a biak theihna dingun mite paisak in. Egypt a siatna theitel nailo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro kiangah Moses leh Aaron kipaipih kik hi. Faro in amaute kiangah, “Pai un; Topa, na Pasian uh va bia un. Ahi zongin kua teng pai ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Moses in, “Ka khangnote uh leh ka khanghamte uh tawh ka paikhawm ding uh hi. Ka tapate uh, ka tanute uh, ka tuuhonte uh, leh ka bawnghonte uh tawh ka pai ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa-a' dingin pawi khat ka kham ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Faro in amaute kiangah, “Note tawh na naupangte uh kong paisak taak leh note tawh Topa hong om ta ve! En un, note in ngimna hoihlo na nei uh hi
Tua bang hilo ding! Note' lak panin pasalte pai un la, Topa va bia un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen nomau' ut ahi hi,” a ci hi. Faro' omna panin amaute kihawlkhia hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt leitang tungah amaute hong omin, gialpi in a deen' baang kung khempeuh a ne ding kauphete sapna-in Egypt leitang tungah na khut zan khia in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Egypt leitang tungah a ciangkhut zan a, Topa in tua sun tawntung leh tua zan tawntung leitang tungah nisuahna huih a nungsak hi. Zingsang ciangin nisuahna huih in kauphete hong tun' khin hi
Tua masiah kauphe hon tua banga a tam a om ngeilo, cikmah ciangin zong a omkik ngeilo ding, Egypt leitang tung khempeuhah kauphe hong om a, Egypt gam buppi-ah a dim uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate in lei maitang khempeuh tuam uh a, leitang mial hi. Tuate in leitang tunga kung khempeuh leh gialpi' deen' baang singkung gah khempeuh ne uh hi. Egypt leitang tung khempeuhah gamlak singkung hita leh kungno hita leh a hing khat beek om nawnlo hi
Tua ciangin Faro in Moses leh Aaron nawh sap a, “ Topa na Pasian' tung leh nangma tungah ka khial khin hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka khialhna hong maisak in. Tu-a khatvei bek, kong thum hi; keima tung panin hih sihna a lakkhiat ding Topa na Pasian' tungah thum in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro kiang panin amah paikhia-in Topa' tungah a thum hi
Topa in nitumna huihpi hat mahmah khat nungsak a, tua huih in kauphete laamto-in San Tuipi sung a den'na hi. Egypt gam sungah kauphe khat zong om nawnlo hi
Ahih hangin Topa in Faro' lungsim khauhsak a, amah in Israel mite paisaklo hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite in khuamial sung a zawtna ding, Egypt leitang tungah khuamial a om theihna dingin vantung lamah na khut zan in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in vantung lamah a khut zan a, Egypt leitang tung khempeuh ni thum sung khua mial bikbek hi
Ni thum sung amau khatlekhat kimu theilo uh a, ama omna panin kuamah paikhia theilo hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite in amau' ten'na-ah khuavak nei uh hi
Tua ciangin Faro in Moses samin, “Pai un, Topa va bia un; na tate uh zong note tawh hong pai thei ding hi. Na tuuhonte uh leh na bawnghonte uh omsak lai un,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in, “ Topa ka Pasian uh tungah ka piak theihna dingun biakpiakna leh meihal biakna kote nong neihsak kul hi

Ka ganhingte uh zong kote tawh a pai kul hi. Ganno khat zong kinusialo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ka Pasian uh ka biakna dingun tuate ka paipih ding uh hi. A mun ka tun' matengun bang pen tawh Topa bia ding cih ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Topa in Faro' lungsim khauhsak a, amah in amaute paisak lo hi
Tua ciangin Faro in ama kiangah, “Kei kiang panin kihem in. Nang kidawm in. Ka maitang hong mu kik nawn kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka maitang nong muh ni-in nang na si ding hi,” a ci hi
Moses in, “Na cih bang hita hen! Na maitang kong mu kik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
